# Performance Playbook

## Metrics that matter
- LCP for first-view confidence.
- CLS for perceived stability and trust.
- INP for responsiveness on interactive surfaces.
- Time to meaningful discovery on mobile.

## Common affiliate marketplace bottlenecks
- Overweight hero media.
- Too many client components for mostly static sections.
- Heavy icon, animation, or tracking script usage.
- Images and logos loaded without prioritization.
- Rendering large grids before the user needs them.

## Optimization order
1. Critical rendering path.
2. Large media and images.
3. Unnecessary client-side work.
4. Third-party scripts.
5. Secondary UI polish.

## Conversion lens
- Faster discovery improves click-out potential.
- Stable layouts increase trust.
- Script discipline protects both performance and privacy posture.
